Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The online game I got from Junpei[n]is installed on this computer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya and I spent a lot of[n]time together in that game.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}She realized something important through[n]the game and applied it in her real life too...[n]{f 1 1}
